summary: Parallel review: FAIL (3 critical, 2 warning, 5 suggestion). Compound gate: WARN

findingsList.text: 🔴 iteration-escalation — Persistent eval warning: fabricated-refs recurred in iterations 1, 2

No 🟡. No 🔴. The iteration's regex relaxation (`^#{2,}\s+Name\b`) and negative test assertions correctly address the prior-review concerns; gate is inline, dependency-free, fails before any side effect, and mirrors the sibling missing-SPEC.md branch.

🟡 test/cli-commands.test.mjs:288 — The regex relaxation (the motivation of this iteration) has no direct test. Add a fixture using `## Goal:`, `### Requirements`, etc., and a negative fixture using `## Goalposts` to pin both the accept and reject sides of the new regex.
